name: Segovia & Toledo with Alcázar Entry from Madrid
tagline: Two UNESCO World Heritage cities, two legendary Alcázar fortresses — one extraordinary day from Madrid
overview: Spain's meseta plateau holds two of the country's most dramatic fortified cities, each within an hour of Madrid. Segovia's fairy-tale Alcázar — the model for Disney's Cinderella castle — and Toledo's clifftop Alcázar fortress bookend a day that also includes the famous Roman aqueduct and Toledo's tangle of medieval streets.
highlights: Entry to the Alcázar of Segovia, Disney's Cinderella inspiration
See the Roman aqueduct of Segovia (2,000 years old)
Visit Toledo, the City of Three Cultures
Entry to the Alcázar of Toledo military museum
Round-trip transport from Madrid with expert guide

itinerary.description: Tour the ship-shaped fortress that reportedly inspired Walt Disney's Cinderella castle. Climb the Torre de Juan II for panoramic views over Old Castile, and admire the Hall of the Monarchs.
Free time at one of the best-preserved Roman engineering marvels in existence — 166 arches of granite blocks held together without a single drop of mortar.
Visit the imposing hilltop fortress rebuilt by Charles I of Spain. Now a military museum with a famous civil war exhibit, it commands views over the entire city.

meeting_point: Madrid city centre — confirmed at booking
tips: Toledo is best explored on foot — wear comfortable shoes
The Alcázar of Segovia is magical in winter snow — consider a December visit
Book the morning slot to avoid midday heat in summer

faqs.question: Which city comes first?
faqs.answer: Typically Segovia in the morning and Toledo in the afternoon, but this can vary by departure.

faqs.question: Can I buy traditional Toledo items?
faqs.answer: Yes, Toledo is famous for damascene metalwork and marzipan. Free time in the old city allows for shopping.

hero_image.alt: The Alcázar of Segovia rising above the Castilian plateau

meta.title: Segovia & Toledo with Alcázar Entry from Madrid
meta.description: Visit the Alcázar of Segovia and Toledo on a guided day trip from Madrid. Entry included. From €79 per person.
